positioning: Individually styled rooms in a Lakeland-stone guest house close to Windermere village.
demo_angle: Compare room character first, then enter the existing booking route.
observed_problem: The official home-page booking URLs contain fixed July 2020 dates and the room comparison is separated from the booking action.
image_plan: Official exterior as the recognisable hero
risk_notes: No live availability, prices, rating or review copy
